description: Prompt version registry. Increment 'version' when the prompt content changes. Hash is computed dynamically by get_prompt_hash() — do not hard-code it here.

generator.description: Playwright test generator — converts URL + user story into a runnable .spec.ts file

healer.description: Test failure healer and analyzer — diagnoses failure type, explains reasoning, proposes code fix

vision.description: Visual Playwright test generator — generates tests from screenshots via vision model
